'''Asha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. When [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] met her, he sensed something special about her, indicating a possible [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]].

==Biography==
Asha was one of many of [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] palace servants at the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Naboo Crisis]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. She was being pursued by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in the palace kitchen when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who was trying to [[Capture of Theed/Legends|rescue]] the Queen before the Trade Federation could take her to [[Camp Four/Legends|Camp Four]] arrived and saved her. Kenobi sensed something special about her, indicating a possible [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitivity]]. In return, Asha helped Kenobi reach the throne room as she was able to [[Slicer/Legends|crack]] into the security doors. However, Kenobi had arrived too late to save the Queen at the throne room. Nevertheless, he and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] were able to rescue her as she was escorted to Camp 4.

During the Queen's absence, Asha became one of the leaders of the [[Naboo Resistance]]. When the Queen decided to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|reclaim]] Naboo, Asha met up with Kenobi again. She assigned the Jedi to [[Rescue mission in Theed|free]] [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo starfighter's]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who were held hostage by the Trade Federation's battle droids; Kenobi escorted the pilots to join up with Asha and the Resistance, who were fighting battle droids. She then sent Kenobi to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|destroy]] the [[Quad turbolaser cannon (Trade Federation)|turbolaser cannon]] so that the pilots could take off safely.

==Behind the scenes==
Asha was voiced by [[Grey Griffin|Grey DeLisle]] in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']].
